miwi        2009-07-07 19:28:06 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-Gearman-XS  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This is a Perl front end for the Gearman C library. It aims to provide
  a simple interface closely tied to the C library.
  
  WWW: http://www.gearmand.org
  
  PR:             ports/136256
  Submitted by:   Alex Kapranoff <ka at nadoby.ru>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3548    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile

  1.1       +12 -0     ports/devel/p5-Gearman-XS/pkg-plist (new)
